footer.tagline: "Exploring the Nuclear World: Interactive, Reliable, and Open for All."
footer.address: Politeknik Teknologi Nuklir Indonesia, Jl. Babarsari Kotak POB 6101/YKKB, Sleman, D.I. Yogyakarta 55281

simulationMenu.title: Simulations Hub
simulationMenu.subtitle: Choose an interactive simulation module to learn nuclear physics and radiation protection concepts visually.

radioactive-decay.title: Radioactive Decay
radioactive-decay.description: Learn the law of exponential decay, half-life (T½), and see atoms decay in real-time.

radiation-types.title: Types of Radiation
radiation-types.description: Observe the differences in penetrating power of Alpha, Beta, and Gamma particles on various shield materials.

rutherford-scattering.title: Rutherford Scattering
rutherford-scattering.description: Historical simulation of firing Alpha particles at gold foil to understand atomic nucleus structure.

nuclear-reactor.title: Simple Nuclear Reactor
nuclear-reactor.description: Understand the U-235 fission chain reaction and the mechanism of reactor control rods.

radiation-detector.title: Radiation Detector
radiation-detector.description: Visualization of the inner workings and physics principles inside a Geiger-Müller detector tube.
